description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with reddish-brown tiles and a spacious front garden divided into two symmetrical sections with decorative landscaping. The structure is primarily white with clean, modern lines and includes a large backyard area with a rectangular swimming pool and patio. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessed by a central pathway flanked by greenery and palm trees. The rear section of the bungalow appears to have a flat roof and multiple rectangular windows, suggesting a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements. The property is enclosed by low walls, providing privacy while maintaining an open, inviting feel. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living, with ample space for relaxation and recreation.
description: A modern white bungalow with a gable roof, landscaped front garden, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design blends traditional and contemporary elements with clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, symmetrical landscaped garden, and central entrance pathway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the pool area, and the transition from the gable-roofed section to the flat-roofed rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed section, multiple windows, and the pool area adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, pool, and the full length of the bungalow with both roof types visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
